headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Synchrony Financial, Lowers Price Target to $78
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Richard Shane   maintains Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $81 to $78.
